    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="zh-TW">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
    <title>Lilou｜迷你可麗露專賣</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@tailwindcss/browser@4"></script>
    <style>
    :root {
    --brand-color: #5B7290;
    --brand-dark: #3E4F66;
    --brand-bg: #F4F6F9;
    --brand-text-dark: #222222;
    }
    input, select, textarea {
    -webkit-appearance: none;
    appearance: none;
    }
    input[type="tel"],
    input[type="text"],
    input[type="email"],
    input[type="number"],
    textarea {
    font-size: 16px;
    }
    input[type=number]::-webkit-inner-spin-button,
    input[type=number]::-webkit-outer-spin-button {
    -webkit-appearance: none;
    margin: 0;
    }
    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
    .spinner {
    border: 3px solid rgba(91, 114, 144, 0.2);
    width: 36px;
    height: 36px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border-left-color: #5B7290;
    animation: spin 1s linear infinite;
    margin: 0 auto;
    }
    @keyframes spin {
    0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
    100% { transform: rotate(360deg); }
    }
    .no-zoom-area { touch-action: manipulation; }
    .social-icon-svg {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    display: block;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    object-fit: contain;
    }
    html {
    background: #1C1715;
    }
    body {
    min-height: 100dvh;
    background: #F5F7FB;
    padding-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom);
    }
    footer {
    padding-bottom: calc(2.5rem + env(safe-area-inset-bottom));
    margin-bottom: calc(-1 * env(safe-area-inset-bottom));
    background-color: #1C1715;
    }
    @supports (-webkit-touch-callout: none) {
    body::after {
    content: "";
    position: fixed;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    height: env(safe-area-inset-bottom);
    background: #1C1715;
    z-index: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    }
    }
    </style>
    </head>
    <body class="bg-[#F4F6F9] text-[#222222] min-h-screen flex flex-col font-sans antialiased selection:bg-[#5B7290]/20">
    <!-- LINE 內建瀏覽器提醒 -->
    <div id="lineBrowserNotice" class="fixed inset-0 z-[9999] hidden items-center justify-center px-5 bg-stone-950/55 backdrop-blur-sm">
    <div class="w-full max-w-sm bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-2xl border border-stone-100 overflow-hidden">
    <div class="bg-[#5B7290] px-6 py-5 text-white">
    <div class="text-xs font-black tracking-[0.25em] opacity-80 mb-1">LILOU NOTICE</div>
    <h2 class="text-xl font-black tracking-wide">請使用手機瀏覽器開啟</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="px-6 py-6 space-y-4">
    <div class="flex items-start gap-3">
    <div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 text-lg">
    ⚠️
    </div>
    <div class="space-y-2">
    <p class="text-sm font-bold text-stone-700 leading-relaxed">
    您目前使用的是 LINE 內建瀏覽器，可能會造成下單、付款或查詢訂單無法正常運作。
    </p>
    <div class="bg-stone-50 border border-stone-100 rounded-2xl p-4 text-sm text-stone-600 leading-relaxed space-y-2">
    <p class="font-black text-stone-800">建議操作方式：</p>
    <p>1. 點擊右上角「⋯」或分享圖示</p>
    <p>2. 選擇「在 <span id="recommendedBrowserName">Safari</span> 中開啟」</p>
    <p>3. 再重新進行下單或查詢</p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <button type="button" onclick="closeLineBrowserNotice()" class="w-full h-12 rounded-xl bg-[#5B7290] text-white font-black tracking-widest hover:bg-[#3E4F66] transition-colors">
    我知道了
    </button>
    <p class="text-[11px] text-center text-stone-400 font-bold leading-relaxed">
    若仍要繼續使用 LINE 瀏覽器，部分功能可能無法正常執行。
    </p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <script>
    const API_URL = "https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbyA3ovLtC-hDYGL-_9CMNKk9A--TcrU-W-mN6Hc0GaZ8eDrvAsew3ZdtYBLSyimuiU/exec";
    let shippingFee = 129;
    let cart = [];
    let localProducts = [];
    let localPackaging = [];
    let localCoupons = [];
    let currentBoxLimit = null;
    let localPickupDates = [];
    let localDeliveryDates = [];
    let appliedCoupon = null;
    let submissionTimeout = null;
    let submissionInterval = null;
    let countdownSeconds = 20;
    let pendingOrderSnapshot = null;
    let sharePlainText = "";
    </script>
    <nav class="bg-[#5B7290] text-white p-4 md:p-5 shadow-sm sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-md bg-opacity-95">
    <div class="max-w-3xl mx-auto flex justify-between items-center">
    <a href="#" class="flex items-center shrink-0" aria-label="Lilou 首頁">
    <img
    src="images/lilou-logo.svg"
    alt="Lilou"
    class="h-9 md:h-11 w-auto object-contain block">
    </a>
    <div class="flex items-center gap-6 font-bold tracking-widest text-xs md:text-sm">
    <button type="button" id="navShopBtn" onclick="switchMode('shop')" class="cursor-pointer transition-all duration-200 border-b-2 border-white pb-0.5 text-white">
    我要購物
    </button>
    <button type="button" id="navQueryBtn" onclick="switchMode('query')" class="cursor-pointer transition-all duration-200 pb-0.5 text-white/70">
    查詢訂單
    </button>
    </div>
    </div>
    </nav>
    <div class="max-w-3xl mx-auto p-4 md:p-6 md:py-12 flex-1 w-full">
    <main id="formContainer" class="space-y-6 md:space-y-8">
    <div id="shopContentWrapper" class="space-y-6 md:space-y-8">
    <div class="text-center py-2 space-y-2">
    <h2 class="text-2xl md:text-4xl font-black text-[#222222] tracking-wider">【迷你可麗露專賣】</h2>
    <p class="text-stone-500 text-xs md:text-base tracking-wide max-w-sm md:max-w-xl mx-auto leading-relaxed">客製化挑選您的精緻組合，每週限量甜點供應。</p>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-white p-4 md:p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-xs border border-stone-100 space-y-5">
    <div class="flex items-center gap-2 border-b border-stone-100 pb-3 mb-1">
    <span class="bg-[#5B7290] text-white text-xs md:text-sm font-black px-2 py-0.5 rounded">01</span>
    <h3 class="text-sm md:text-base font-black text-[#5B7290] tracking-widest uppercase">客製化您的組合</h3>
    </div>
    <div class="space-y-2">
    <label class="block text-xs md:text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-stone-600">1. 請先挑選包裝類型 *</label>
    <select id="boxSelect" class="w-full px-3 border border-stone-200 rounded-xl bg-stone-50 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#5B7290] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#5B7290] text-sm md:text-base font-bold cursor-pointer h-12 md:h-14" onchange="handleBoxChange()">
    <option value="" disabled selected>庫存查詢中...</option>
    </select>
    </div>
    <div id="flavorSection" class="space-y-4 pt-3 border-t border-stone-100">
    <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
    <label class="block text-xs md:text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-stone-600">2. 請挑選組合內口味與數量：</label>
    <span id="currentBoxCountDisplay" class="text-xs md:text-sm font-black text-stone-700 bg-stone-100 px-2 py-1 rounded-md">請先挑選包裝類型</span>
    </div>
    <div id="flavorMenu" class="space-y-1 divide-y divide-stone-100">
    <div class="animate-pulse flex items-center justify-between py-3.5">
    <div class="h-4 bg-stone-200 rounded-md w-1/3"></div>
    <div class="flex items-center gap-3"><div class="h-8 bg-stone-200 rounded-lg w-28"></div></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="pt-2 space-y-3">
    <div class="bg-stone-50 border border-stone-100 rounded-xl p-3 flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between gap-3">
    <div class="space-y-0.5">
    <div class="text-xs md:text-sm font-black text-stone-700 tracking-wider">重複此組合</div>
    <div class="text-[11px] md:text-xs text-stone-400 font-bold">大量訂購可調整，一般訂購維持 1 組即可</div>
    </div>
    <div class="no-zoom-area flex items-center bg-white rounded-xl p-1 border border-stone-200 gap-1 w-fit">
    <button type="button" onclick="changeRepeatBoxQty(-1)" style="width: 34px; height: 34px;" class="flex items-center justify-center font-black text-stone-600 hover:text-stone-900 bg-stone-50 rounded-lg border border-stone-200 active:bg-stone-100 cursor-pointer text-sm">—</button>
    <input type="number" id="repeatBoxQty" min="1" max="99" value="1" inputmode="numeric" oninput="handleRepeatBoxInput(this)" onblur="handleRepeatBoxBlur(this)" style="width: 52px; height: 34px;" class="text-center text-base font-black bg-transparent border-0 focus:outline-none text-stone-800">
    <button type="button" onclick="changeRepeatBoxQty(1)" style="width: 34px; height: 34px;" class="flex items-center justify-center font-black text-stone-600 hover:text-stone-900 bg-stone-50 rounded-lg border border-stone-200 active:bg-stone-100 cursor-pointer text-sm">＋</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <button type="button" onclick="packBoxToCart()" class="w-full bg-stone-300 text-white font-extrabold tracking-widest h-12 rounded-xl text-sm md:text-base uppercase shadow-xs cursor-not-allowed transition-all duration-200" id="packBtn" disabled>
    正在同步最新庫存中...
    </button>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <form id="orderForm" class="bg-white p-4 md:p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-xs border border-stone-100 space-y-6 md:space-y-8" onsubmit="handleOrderSubmit(event)" onkeypress="return preventEnterSubmit(event)">
    <div id="cartSectionAnchor" class="space-y-4 scroll-mt-20">
    <div class="flex items-center gap-2 border-b border-stone-100 pb-3">
    <span class="bg-[#5B7290] text-white text-xs md:text-sm font-black px-2 py-0.5 rounded">02</span>
    <h3 class="text-sm md:text-base font-black text-[#5B7290] tracking-widest uppercase">確認已打包的組合明細</h3>
    </div>
    <div id="cartListContainer" class="space-y-2.5 transition-all duration-300">
    <p class="text-stone-400 text-center py-6 text-xs md:text-base">購物車目前空空的喔！</p>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="space-y-4 md:space-y-6 pt-2">
    <div class="flex items-center gap-2 border-b border-stone-100 pb-3">
    <span class="bg-[#5B7290] text-white text-xs md:text-sm font-black px-2 py-0.5 rounded">03</span>
    <h3 class="text-sm md:text-base font-black text-[#5B7290] tracking-wider uppercase">填寫訂購資訊</h3>
    </div>
    <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 md:gap-6">
    <div>
    <label class="block text-xs md:text-sm font-bold text-stone-600 mb-1.5">訂購人姓名 *</label>
    <input type="text" id="custName" class="w-full px-3 border border-stone-200 rounded-xl text-sm md:text-base focus:outline-none focus:border-[#5B7290] h-12 md:h-14 bg-stone-50/50" placeholder="請輸入姓名" required>
    </div>
    <div>
    <label class="block text-xs md:text-sm font-bold text-stone-600 mb-1.5">聯絡電話 *</label>
    <input type="tel" id="custPhone" maxlength="10" pattern="09[0-9]{8}" inputmode="numeric" class="w-full px-3 border border-stone-200 rounded-xl text-sm md:text-base focus:outline-none focus:border-[#5B7290] h-12 md:h-14 bg-stone-50/50" placeholder="請輸入10碼手機號碼" required>
    </div>
    <div>
    <label class="block text-xs md:text-sm font-bold text-stone-600 mb-1.5">Email *</label>
    <input type="email" id="custEmail" class="w-full px-3 border border-stone-200 rounded-xl text-sm md:text-base focus:outline-none focus:border-[#5B7290] h-12 md:h-14 bg-stone-50/50" placeholder="請輸入 Email，接收訂單通知" required>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 md:gap-6">
    <div>
    <label class="block text-xs md:text-sm font-bold text-stone-600 mb-1.5">配送方式 *</label>
    <select id="shipMethod" class="w-full px-3 border border-stone-200 rounded-xl text-sm md:text-base focus:outline-none focus:border-[#5B7290] cursor-pointer h-12 md:h-14 bg-stone-50/50" onchange="handleShippingMethodChange()" required>
    <option value="store">門市自取付款</option>
    <option value="delivery">7-11 店到店取貨（運費另計）</option>
    </select>
    </div>
    <div>
    <label id="dateLabel" class="block text-xs md:text-sm font-bold text-[#5B7290] mb-1.5">門市自取日期 *</label>
    <select id="shipDate" class="w-full px-3 border border-stone-200 rounded-xl text-sm md:text-base focus:outline-none focus:border-[#5B7290] bg-white font-bold text-stone-800 cursor-pointer h-12 md:h-14" required>
    <option value="" disabled selected>正在載入可用日期...</option>
    </select>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="addressGroup" class="transition-all duration-300 space-y-1.5">
    <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
    <label id="addressLabel" class="block text-xs md:text-sm font-bold text-stone-600">自取門市地址</label>
    <a id="mapLink" href="https://emap.pcsc.com.tw/" target="_blank" style="display: none;" class="text-xs font-bold text-emerald-600 hover:text-emerald-800 underline inline-flex items-center gap-0.5">
    開啟 7-11 門市地圖查詢
    </a>
    </div>
    <input type="text" id="custAddress" class="w-full px-3 border border-stone-200 rounded-xl text-sm md:text-base focus:outline-none h-12 md:h-14 bg-stone-100 font-bold text-stone-700 select-all" value="高雄市前鎮區景德路72巷12號" readonly>
    </div>
    <div>
    <label class="block text-xs md:text-sm font-bold text-stone-600 mb-1.5">折扣碼</label>
    <div class="flex gap-2">
    <input type="text" id="couponInput" class="flex-1 px-3 border border-stone-200 rounded-xl text-sm md:text-base focus:outline-none focus:border-[#5B7290] h-12 md:h-14 bg-stone-50/50 uppercase" placeholder="請輸入折扣碼">
    <button type="button" onclick="applyCouponCode(true)" class="bg-[#5B7290] text-white font-bold px-4 md:px-6 rounded-xl hover:bg-[#3E4F66] transition-all text-sm md:text-base shrink-0 cursor-pointer h-12 md:h-14">
    套用
    </button>
    </div>
    <p id="couponMessage" class="text-xs md:text-sm font-bold mt-1.5 hidden"></p>
    </div>
    <div>
    <label class="block text-xs md:text-sm font-bold text-stone-600 mb-1.5">備註說明</label>
    <textarea id="orderNote" rows="2" class="w-full p-3 border border-stone-200 rounded-xl text-sm md:text-base focus:outline-none focus:border-[#5B7290] bg-stone-50/50" placeholder="若有特殊需求請在此註記"></textarea>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-stone-50 p-4 md:p-6 rounded-xl space-y-1.5 text-right text-stone-500 text-xs md:text-sm tracking-wide border border-stone-100">
    <div>商品總計 Subtotal: <span id="subtotalDisplay" class="font-bold text-stone-700 md:text-base">$0</span></div>
    <div id="shipFeeDisplay" class="hidden">7-11 冷凍運費 Shipping: <span class="font-bold text-stone-700 md:text-base">+$129</span></div>
    <div id="couponDiscountDisplay" class="hidden text-red-500 font-bold">折扣折抵 Discount: <span class="md:text-base">-$0</span></div>
    <div class="text-[#222222] font-black text-xl md:text-2xl pt-2.5 border-t border-stone-200 mt-2">
    總金額 Total：<span id="totalDisplay" class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-black text-[#5B7290]">$0</span>
    </div>
    </div>
    <button type="submit" class="w-full bg-[#3E2D20] text-white font-extrabold tracking-widest h-14 md:h-16 rounded-xl hover:bg-[#2B1F16] shadow-sm cursor-pointer text-base md:text-lg uppercase transition-colors duration-150">
    送出預購訂單 Submit Order
    </button>
    </form>
    </div>
    <div id="queryContentWrapper" class="hidden space-y-6 md:space-y-8">
    <div class="text-center py-2 space-y-2">
    <h2 class="text-2xl md:text-4xl font-black text-[#222222] tracking-wider">查詢訂單</h2>
    <p class="text-stone-500 text-xs md:text-base tracking-wide max-w-sm md:max-w-xl mx-auto leading-relaxed">
    請輸入下單時填寫的手機號碼，即可查詢訂單狀態。
    </p>
    </div>
    <section class="bg-white p-4 md:p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-xs border border-stone-100 space-y-5">
    <div class="flex items-center gap-2 border-b border-stone-100 pb-3 mb-1">
    <span class="bg-[#5B7290] text-white text-xs md:text-sm font-black px-2 py-0.5 rounded">ORDER</span>
    <h3 class="text-sm md:text-base font-black text-[#5B7290] tracking-widest uppercase">訂單進度查詢</h3>
    </div>
    <div class="space-y-2">
    <label class="block text-xs md:text-sm font-bold text-stone-600 mb-1.5">手機號碼 *</label>
    <div class="space-y-2">
    <input type="tel" id="queryPhone" maxlength="10" pattern="09[0-9]{8}" inputmode="numeric" class="w-full px-3 border border-stone-200 rounded-xl text-sm md:text-base focus:outline-none focus:border-[#5B7290] h-12 md:h-14 bg-stone-50/50" placeholder="請輸入10碼手機號碼">
    <button type="button" onclick="queryCustomerOrders()" class="w-full bg-[#5B7290] text-white font-bold px-4 md:px-6 rounded-xl hover:bg-[#3E4F66] transition-all text-sm md:text-base shrink-0 cursor-pointer h-12 md:h-14">
    查詢
    </button>
    </div>
    <p class="text-[11px] md:text-xs text-stone-400 font-medium leading-relaxed">
    僅會顯示與此手機號碼相符的訂單資料。
    </p>
    </div>
    </section>
    <section id="queryResultArea" class="space-y-4"></section>
    </div>
    </main>
    <section id="receiptContainer" class="hidden bg-white p-6 md:p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-stone-100 space-y-6">
    <div class="text-center border-b border-stone-100 pb-4">
    <h2 class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-black text-stone-800 tracking-wider">訂購成功！<br>Lilou 預購確認單</h2>
    </div>
    <div id="receiptContent"></div>
    <div class="space-y-3 pt-4 border-t border-stone-100">
    <button type="button" onclick="shareReceipt()" class="w-full bg-[#5B7290] text-white font-black h-12 md:h-14 rounded-xl hover:bg-[#3E4F66] transition-colors shadow-xs cursor-pointer text-sm md:text-base uppercase tracking-wider">
    分享或儲存預購明細
    </button>
    <button type="button" onclick="window.location.reload()" class="w-full border border-stone-200 text-stone-600 font-bold h-12 md:h-14 rounded-xl hover:bg-stone-50 transition-colors cursor-pointer text-sm tracking-wider">
    返回商店首頁
    </button>
    </div>
    </section>
    </div>
    <footer class="bg-stone-900 text-stone-400 py-8 px-4 mt-12 border-t border-stone-800 font-sans">
    <div class="max-w-3xl mx-auto flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-6 text-center md:text-left">
    <div class="space-y-1.5">
    <div class="text-white font-black text-base md:text-lg tracking-widest">粒露 Lilou｜迷你可麗露專賣</div>
    <div class="text-xs md:text-sm text-stone-400 font-medium tracking-wide">高雄市前鎮區景德路72巷12號<br>營業時間 14:00－18:00，不定期公休</div>
    <div class="text-[11px] text-stone-500 pt-1">© 2026 Lilou Dessert. All rights reserved.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
    <a href="https://lin.ee/ane79Cw" target="_blank" class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-stone-800 hover:bg-[#06C755] flex items-center justify-center transition-all duration-200 text-stone-300 hover:text-white shadow-xs shrink-0" title="官方 LINE">
    <svg class="social-icon-svg fill-current" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M19.365 9.863c.349 0 .633.285.633.633 0 .349-.284.633-.633.633h-1.65v1.052h1.65c.349 0 .633.285.633.633 0 .349-.284.633-.633.633h-2.283a.633.633 0 0 1-.633-.633V8.182c0-.349.284-.633.633-.633h2.283c.349 0 .633.284.633.633 0 .349-.284.633-.633.633h-1.65v1.048h1.65Zm-3.522 2.951a.633.633 0 0 1-1.141.379l-2.102-2.851v2.472a.633.633 0 0 1-1.266 0V8.182a.633.633 0 0 1 1.141-.379l2.102 2.851V8.182a.633.633 0 0 1 1.266 0v4.632Zm-5.389 0a.633.633 0 0 1-1.266 0V8.182a.633.633 0 0 1 1.266 0v4.632Zm-2.057.633H6.114a.633.633 0 0 1-.633-.633V8.182a.633.633 0 0 1 1.266 0v3.999h1.65c.349 0 .633.285.633.633 0 .349-.284.633-.633.633ZM12 2C6.486 2 2 5.697 2 10.241c0 4.074 3.636 7.486 8.548 8.132.333.072.786.221.901.506.103.258.067.662.033.923l-.146.878c-.045.258-.206 1.01.866.551 1.073-.459 5.789-3.409 7.9-5.838C21.56 13.793 22 12.147 22 10.241 22 5.697 17.514 2 12 2Z"/>
    </svg>
    </a>
    <a href="https://www.instagram.com/lilou.official_/" target="_blank" class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-stone-800 hover:bg-[#E1306C] flex items-center justify-center transition-all duration-200 text-stone-300 hover:text-white shadow-xs shrink-0" title="官方 Instagram">
    <svg class="social-icon-svg stroke-current fill-none stroke-2" viewBox="0 0 24 24" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
    <rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="20" rx="5" ry="5"></rect>
    <path d="M16 11.37A4 4 0 1 1 12.63 8 4 4 0 0 1 16 11.37z"></path>
    <line x1="17.5" y1="6.5" x2="17.51" y2="6.5"></line>
    </svg>
    </a>
    </div>
    </div>
    </footer>
    <div id="countdownOverlay" class="fixed inset-0 bg-stone-950/70 backdrop-blur-xs flex items-center justify-center z-50 hidden">
    <div class="bg-white p-6 md:p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-xl max-w-sm w-full text-center space-y-5 mx-4 border border-stone-100">
    <div class="space-y-1.5">
    <h3 id="overlayMainTitle" class="text-lg md:text-xl font-black text-stone-800">訂單準備送出中...</h3>
    <p id="overlaySubTitle" class="text-xs text-stone-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">倒數結束前可隨時確認或調整</p>
    </div>
    <div class="text-6xl font-black text-[#5B7290] animate-bounce py-1" id="countdownTimer">20</div>
    <div class="bg-stone-50 border border-stone-200 p-4 rounded-xl text-left space-y-3 text-sm md:text-base text-stone-700 leading-relaxed font-sans">
    <div>
    <span class="font-extrabold text-stone-400 block text-xs uppercase mb-0.5">配送方式：</span>
    <span id="overlayMethod" class="text-stone-900 font-black text-sm md:text-base"></span>
    </div>
    <div>
    <span id="overlayDateLabel" class="font-extrabold text-stone-400 block text-xs uppercase mb-0.5">取貨日期：</span>
    <span id="overlayDate" class="text-stone-900 font-black text-sm md:text-base"></span>
    </div>
    <div class="border-t border-stone-200 pt-2.5 mt-2 flex justify-between items-center">
    <span class="font-extrabold text-stone-800 text-sm md:text-base">應付總額：</span>
    <span id="overlayTotal" class="font-black text-base md:text-lg text-[#5B7290]"></span>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="loadingAnimationBlock" style="display: none;" class="py-2 space-y-2">
    <div class="spinner"></div>
    <p class="text-xs text-[#5B7290] font-black tracking-wider animate-pulse">訂單同步中...</p>
    </div>
    <p id="overlayBottomPrompt" class="text-[11px] text-stone-400 leading-relaxed font-medium">正確認商品庫存。</p>
    <div id="overlayActionButtons" class="flex gap-2.5 pt-1">
    <button type="button" onclick="cancelOrderSubmission()" class="flex-1 border border-stone-200 text-stone-500 font-bold h-12 rounded-xl hover:bg-stone-50 transition-colors text-xs md:text-sm uppercase shadow-2xs cursor-pointer">
    取消調整
    </button>
    <button type="button" onclick="instantOrderSubmission()" class="flex-1 bg-[#5B7290] text-white font-extrabold h-12 rounded-xl hover:bg-[#3E4F66] transition-colors text-xs md:text-sm uppercase shadow-xs cursor-pointer">
    直接送出
    </button>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <script>
    function switchMode(targetMode) {
    const formContainer = document.getElementById('formContainer');
    const shopWrapper = document.getElementById('shopContentWrapper');
    const queryWrapper = document.getElementById('queryContentWrapper');
    const receiptContainer = document.getElementById('receiptContainer');
    const shopBtn = document.getElementById('navShopBtn');
    const queryBtn = document.getElementById('navQueryBtn');
    formContainer.classList.remove('hidden');
    receiptContainer.classList.add('hidden');
    if (targetMode === 'shop') {
    shopWrapper.classList.remove('hidden');
    queryWrapper.classList.add('hidden');
    shopBtn.className = "cursor-pointer transition-all duration-200 border-b-2 border-white pb-0.5 text-white";
    queryBtn.className = "cursor-pointer transition-all duration-200 pb-0.5 text-white/70";
    } else if (targetMode === 'query') {
    shopWrapper.classList.add('hidden');
    queryWrapper.classList.remove('hidden');
    shopBtn.className = "cursor-pointer transition-all duration-200 pb-0.5 text-white/70";
    queryBtn.className = "cursor-pointer transition-all duration-200 border-b-2 border-white pb-0.5 text-white";
    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
    }
    }
    window.switchMode = switchMode;
    function preventEnterSubmit(e) {
    const keyCode = e.keyCode || e.which;
    if (keyCode === 13 && e.target.tagName !== 'TEXTAREA') {
    e.preventDefault();
    return false;
    }
    return true;
    }
    function handleShippingMethodChange() {
    const method = document.getElementById('shipMethod').value;
    const addrInput = document.getElementById('custAddress');
    const shipFeeDisplay = document.getElementById('shipFeeDisplay');
    const dateLabel = document.getElementById('dateLabel');
    const mapLink = document.getElementById('mapLink');
    const addressLabel = document.getElementById('addressLabel');
    if(method === 'delivery') {
    addressLabel.innerText = "7-11 取貨門市名稱 *";
    mapLink.style.display = 'inline-flex';
    addrInput.required = true;
    addrInput.readOnly = false;
    if(addrInput.value === "高雄市前鎮區景德路72巷12號" || addrInput.value === "") {
    addrInput.value = "";
    }
    addrInput.placeholder = "範例：Lilou門市";
    addrInput.className = "w-full px-3 border border-stone-200 rounded-xl text-sm md:text-base focus:outline-none focus:border-[#5B7290] h-12 md:h-14 bg-stone-50/50 text-stone-800 font-normal";
    shipFeeDisplay.querySelector('span').innerText = `+$${shippingFee}`;
    shipFeeDisplay.classList.remove('hidden');
    dateLabel.innerText = "希望到貨日期 *";
    } else {
    addressLabel.innerText = "自取門市地址";
    mapLink.style.display = 'none';
    addrInput.required = false;
    addrInput.readOnly = true;
    addrInput.value = "高雄市前鎮區景德路72巷12號";
    addrInput.className = "w-full px-3 border border-stone-200 rounded-xl text-sm md:text-base focus:outline-none h-12 md:h-14 bg-stone-100 font-bold text-stone-700 select-all";
    shipFeeDisplay.classList.add('hidden');
    dateLabel.innerText = "門市自取日期 *";
    }
    renderAvailableDates(method);
    calculateTotal();
    }
    function getWeekdayStr(dateStr) {
    try {
    let clean = dateStr.toString().replace(/\s+/g, '').replace(/-/g, '/');
    if (clean.split('/').length === 2) {
    clean = new Date().getFullYear() + '/' + clean;
    }
    const parts = clean.split('/');
    if (parts.length === 3) {
    const year = parseInt(parts[0], 10);
    const month = parseInt(parts[1], 10) - 1;
    const day = parseInt(parts[2], 10);
    const parsedDate = new Date(year, month, day);
    if (!isNaN(parsedDate.getTime())) {
    const weekday = ["日", "一", "二", "三", "四", "五", "六"][parsedDate.getDay()];
    return ` (週${weekday})`;
    }
    }
    } catch (e) {}
    return "";
    }
    window.renderAvailableDates = function(method) {
    const dateSelect = document.getElementById('shipDate');
    const textPrompt = method === 'delivery' ? '希望到貨日期' : '自取日期';
    const targetDates = method === 'delivery' ? localDeliveryDates : localPickupDates;
    let optionsHtml = "";
    let hasValidDate = false;
    if(targetDates && targetDates.length > 0 && targetDates[0] !== "目前無可選擇日期" && targetDates[0] !== "") {
    targetDates.forEach(dateStr => {
    if (!dateStr) return;
    let cleanDate = dateStr.toString().replace(/["'\r\n]/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, '').trim().replace(/-/g, '/');
    if(cleanDate !== "") {
    let wStr = getWeekdayStr(cleanDate);
    optionsHtml += `<option value="${cleanDate}">${cleanDate}${wStr}</option>`;
    hasValidDate = true;
    }
    });
    }
    if (!hasValidDate) {
    const limitDays = method === 'delivery' ? 7 : 2;
    optionsHtml = `<option value="" disabled selected>-- 目前無可選擇日期 --</option>`;
    } else {
    optionsHtml = `<option value="" disabled selected>-- 請選擇${textPrompt} --</option>` + optionsHtml;
    }
    dateSelect.innerHTML = optionsHtml;
    }
    async function fetchOptions() {
    const CACHE_KEY = "lilou_shop_fast_cache";
    const TIME_KEY = "lilou_shop_cache_time";
    const now = new Date().getTime();
    try {
    const cacheBuster = `&_=${now}`;
    const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}?action=getFormOptions${cacheBuster}`);
    const data = await res.json();
    localStorage.setItem(CACHE_KEY, JSON.stringify(data));
    localStorage.setItem(TIME_KEY, now.toString());
    renderUIWithData(data);
    } catch (err) { console.error("同步失敗", err); }
    }
    function renderUIWithData(data) {
    localProducts = data.products;
    localPackaging = data.packaging;
    localCoupons = data.coupons || [];
    if(data.settings) {
    localPickupDates = [];
    localDeliveryDates = [];
    Object.keys(data.settings).forEach(key => {
    const cleanKey = key.toString().replace(/\s+/g, '').trim().toLowerCase();
    const rawStr = data.settings[key].toString().replace(/^["\s]+|["\s]+$/g, '').trim();
    if (rawStr === "" || rawStr === "目前無可選擇日期") return;
    if (cleanKey === "pickup_available_dates") {
    localPickupDates = rawStr.split(',').map(d => d.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    }
    if (cleanKey === "delivery_available_dates") {
    localDeliveryDates = rawStr.split(',').map(d => d.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    }
    });
    }
    const boxSelect = document.getElementById('boxSelect');
    const savedVal = boxSelect.value;
    boxSelect.innerHTML = `<option value="" disabled selected>-- 請選擇包裝樣式 --</option>` + localPackaging.map(p => `<option value="${p.name}" data-extra="${p.extra_price}">${p.name} (+$${p.extra_price})</option>`).join('');
    if(savedVal) boxSelect.value = savedVal;
    const packBtn = document.getElementById('packBtn');
    packBtn.className = "w-full bg-[#5B7290] text-white font-extrabold tracking-widest h-12 rounded-xl hover:bg-[#3E4F66] transition-colors text-sm md:text-base uppercase shadow-xs cursor-pointer";
    packBtn.innerText = "確定組合，打包放入購物車";
    packBtn.disabled = false;
    handleShippingMethodChange();
    renderFlavorMenu();
    renderCart();
    }
    function renderFlavorMenu() {
    const fMenu = document.getElementById('flavorMenu');
    const boxSelect = document.getElementById('boxSelect');
    const isBoxNotSelected = (boxSelect.value === "");
    const bName = boxSelect.value;
    fMenu.innerHTML = localProducts.map((p, idx) => {
    let occupiedInCart = 0;
    cart.forEach(savedBox => { const matchFlavor = savedBox.flavors.find(f => f.name === p.name); if (matchFlavor) occupiedInCart += matchFlavor.quantity; });
    const virtualStock = p.stock - occupiedInCart;
    let isHidden = false;
    if (!isBoxNotSelected) {
    if (bName.includes("限")) {
    if (!p.name.includes("限")) isHidden = true;
    } else {
    if (p.name.includes("限")) isHidden = true;
    }
    }
    if (isHidden) return '';
    const shouldDisable = virtualStock <= 0 || isBoxNotSelected;
    let statusText = '剩 ' + (virtualStock >= 0 ? virtualStock : 0);
    return `
    <div class="flex items-center justify-between py-3 gap-2">
    <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
    <span class="font-bold text-stone-900 text-sm md:text-base break-words block">${p.name}</span>
    <span class="text-[#5B7290] font-black text-sm md:text-base">$${p.price}</span>
    <span class="text-[10px] md:text-xs ${virtualStock <= 0 ? 'text-red-500 font-bold' : 'text-stone-400'} ml-0.5">${statusText}</span>
    </div>
    <div class="no-zoom-area shrink-0 flex items-center bg-stone-100 rounded-xl p-1 border border-stone-200 gap-1 ${(isBoxNotSelected || shouldDisable) ? 'opacity-30 select-none' : ''}">
    <button type="button" onclick="stepFlavorQty(${idx}, -1)" ${shouldDisable ? 'disabled' : ''} style="width: 32px; height: 32px;" class="flex items-center justify-center font-black text-stone-600 hover:text-stone-900 bg-white rounded-lg border border-stone-200 active:bg-stone-50 cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed text-xs md:text-sm">—</button>
    <input type="number" id="flavorQty_${idx}" data-idx="${idx}" min="0" max="${virtualStock >= 0 ? virtualStock : 0}" value="0" ${shouldDisable ? 'disabled' : ''} oninput="handleFlavorInput(this, ${idx})" onblur="handleFlavorBlur(this)" style="width: 44px; height: 32px;" class="flavor-input text-center text-base md:text-base font-black bg-transparent border-0 focus:outline-none text-stone-800">
    <button type="button" id="plusBtn_${idx}" onclick="stepFlavorQty(${idx}, 1)" ${shouldDisable ? 'disabled' : ''} style="width: 32px; height: 32px;" class="flex items-center justify-center font-black text-stone-600 hover:text-stone-900 bg-white rounded-lg border border-stone-200 active:bg-stone-50 cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed text-xs md:text-sm">＋</button>
    </div>
    </div>`;
    }).join('');
    }
    window.stepFlavorQty = function(idx, change) {
    const input = document.getElementById(`flavorQty_${idx}`);
    if (!input) return;
    let currentVal = parseInt(input.value) || 0;
    let newVal = currentVal + change;
    const maxStock = parseInt(input.max) || 0;
    if (newVal < 0) newVal = 0;
    if (newVal > maxStock) newVal = maxStock;
    input.value = newVal;
    calculateCurrentBoxTotal(input, idx, currentVal);
    }
    window.handleFlavorInput = function(inputObj, idx) {
    let newVal = inputObj.value;
    if (newVal === "") return;
    let parsedVal = parseInt(newVal) || 0;
    if (parsedVal < 0) parsedVal = 0;
    const maxAllowed = parseInt(inputObj.max) || 0;
    let currentTotalWithoutSelf = 0;
    document.querySelectorAll('.flavor-input').forEach(inp => {
    if(inp !== inputObj) currentTotalWithoutSelf += (parseInt(inp.value) || 0);
    });
    if (currentBoxLimit && (currentTotalWithoutSelf + parsedVal) > currentBoxLimit) {
    const maxSelfAllowedByBox = currentBoxLimit - currentTotalWithoutSelf;
    alert(`數量超標！此組合限制容量為 ${currentBoxLimit} 個。`);
    parsedVal = maxSelfAllowedByBox < 0 ? 0 : maxSelfAllowedByBox;
    }
    if (parsedVal > maxAllowed) {
    alert(`數量超過目前剩餘可用庫存上限！`);
    parsedVal = maxAllowed;
    }
    inputObj.value = parsedVal;
    calculateCurrentBoxTotal(null);
    }
    window.handleFlavorBlur = function(inputObj) {
    if (inputObj.value === "") inputObj.value = "0";
    calculateCurrentBoxTotal(null);
    }
    window.handleBoxChange = function() {
    const boxSelect = document.getElementById('boxSelect');
    if(boxSelect.value !== "") {
    const bVal = boxSelect.value;
    if (bVal.includes("單入") || bVal.includes("個別") || bVal.includes("免禮盒")) {
    currentBoxLimit = null;
    } else {
    const match = bVal.match(/\d+/);
    currentBoxLimit = match ? parseInt(match[0]) : null;
    }
    } else { currentBoxLimit = null; }
    const bName = boxSelect.value;
    let hasViolation = false;
    localProducts.forEach((p, idx) => {
    const qtyInput = document.getElementById(`flavorQty_${idx}`);
    if (qtyInput && parseInt(qtyInput.value) > 0) {
    if (bName.includes("限")) {
    if (!p.name.includes("限")) hasViolation = true;
    } else {
    if (p.name.includes("限")) hasViolation = true;
    }
    }
    });
    if (hasViolation) {
    alert("【包裝商品不符】已為您切換商品組合選單。系統已自動重設目前輸入的甜點欄位，並為您重新過濾專屬口味。");
    document.querySelectorAll('.flavor-input').forEach(input => input.value = "0");
    }
    document.querySelectorAll('.flavor-input').forEach(input => { if(boxSelect.value === "") input.value = "0"; });
    renderFlavorMenu();
    calculateTotal();
    calculateCurrentBoxTotal(null);
    }
    function calculateCurrentBoxTotal(currentInputObj, changedIdx = null, previousVal = 0) {
    const inputs = document.querySelectorAll('.flavor-input');
    let currentTotal = 0;
    inputs.forEach(input => { currentTotal += (parseInt(input.value) || 0); });
    if (currentBoxLimit && currentTotal > currentBoxLimit) {
    if (currentInputObj && changedIdx !== null) {
    alert(`數量超標！此組合限制容量為 ${currentBoxLimit} 個。`);
    currentInputObj.value = previousVal;
    currentTotal = 0;
    inputs.forEach(input => { currentTotal += (parseInt(input.value) || 0); });
    }
    }
    const display = document.getElementById('currentBoxCountDisplay');
    if (currentBoxLimit) {
    display.innerText = `已選: ${currentTotal} / ${currentBoxLimit} 個`;
    inputs.forEach(input => {
    const idx = parseInt(input.getAttribute('data-idx'));
    const product = localProducts[idx];
    if (!product) return;
    let occupiedInCart = 0;
    cart.forEach(savedBox => { const matchFlavor = savedBox.flavors.find(f => f.name === product.name); if (matchFlavor) occupiedInCart += matchFlavor.quantity; });
    const virtualStock = product.stock - occupiedInCart;
    const selfValue = parseInt(input.value) || 0;
    let allowedMax = selfValue + (currentBoxLimit - currentTotal);
    if (allowedMax > virtualStock) allowedMax = virtualStock;
    input.max = allowedMax >= 0 ? allowedMax : 0;
    });
    } else {
    const boxSelect = document.getElementById('boxSelect');
    display.innerText = boxSelect.value === "" ? "請先挑選包裝類型" : `已選: ${currentTotal} 個`;
    }
    return currentTotal;
    }
    window.changeRepeatBoxQty = function(change) {
    const input = document.getElementById('repeatBoxQty');
    if (!input) return;
    let value = parseInt(input.value) || 1;
    value += change;
    if (value < 1) value = 1;
    if (value > 99) value = 99;
    input.value = value;
    }
    window.handleRepeatBoxInput = function(input) {
    let value = input.value.replace(/\D/g, '');
    if (value === '') {
    input.value = '';
    return;
    }
    let parsed = parseInt(value) || 1;
    if (parsed < 1) parsed = 1;
    if (parsed > 99) parsed = 99;
    input.value = parsed;
    }
    window.handleRepeatBoxBlur = function(input) {
    let parsed = parseInt(input.value) || 1;
    if (parsed < 1) parsed = 1;
    if (parsed > 99) parsed = 99;
    input.value = parsed;
    }
    window.packBoxToCart = function() {
    const boxSelect = document.getElementById('boxSelect');
    if(boxSelect.value === "") { alert("請先挑選要使用的包裝類型！"); return; }
    const boxName = boxSelect.value;
    const boxExtra = parseInt(boxSelect.selectedOptions[0].getAttribute('data-extra')) || 0;
    const repeatQty = Math.max(1, Math.min(99, parseInt(document.getElementById('repeatBoxQty')?.value) || 1));
    const inputs = document.querySelectorAll('.flavor-input');
    let boxFlavors = [];
    let totalFlavorsCountInBox = 0;
    let boxFlavorsCost = 0;
    let hasError = false;
    for (let input of inputs) {
    const qty = parseInt(input.value) || 0;
    if (qty > 0) {
    const idx = parseInt(input.getAttribute('data-idx'));
    const product = localProducts[idx];
    let occupiedInCart = 0;
    cart.forEach(savedBox => { const matchFlavor = savedBox.flavors.find(f => f.name === product.name); if (matchFlavor) occupiedInCart += matchFlavor.quantity; });
    const virtualStock = product.stock - occupiedInCart;
    if ((qty * repeatQty) > virtualStock) { alert(`庫存不足！「${product.name}」重複 ${repeatQty} 組後需要 ${qty * repeatQty} 個，目前最多只能再填入 ${virtualStock >= 0 ? virtualStock : 0} 個。`); hasError = true; break; }
    boxFlavors.push({ name: product.name, price: product.price, quantity: qty });
    totalFlavorsCountInBox += qty;
    boxFlavorsCost += (product.price * qty);
    }
    }
    if (hasError) return;
    if(totalFlavorsCountInBox === 0) { alert("此組合內還沒有放入任何甜點喔！"); return; }
    if (currentBoxLimit && totalFlavorsCountInBox !== currentBoxLimit) { alert(`數量不符！「${boxName}」必須剛好裝滿 ${currentBoxLimit} 個品項。`); return; }
    const packBtn = document.getElementById('packBtn');
    packBtn.disabled = true;
    packBtn.innerText = "✨ 正在將美味組合打包中...";
    packBtn.className = "w-full bg-[#3E4F66] text-white font-extrabold tracking-widest h-12 rounded-xl transition-all text-sm md:text-base uppercase shadow-inner animate-pulse scale-98";
    setTimeout(() => {
    cart.push({
    boxName: boxName,
    boxExtra: boxExtra,
    repeatQty: repeatQty,
    flavors: boxFlavors,
    flavorsCost: boxFlavorsCost,
    totalQty: totalFlavorsCountInBox * repeatQty,
    singleBoxQty: totalFlavorsCountInBox,
    boxTotalCost: (boxFlavorsCost + boxExtra) * repeatQty,
    singleBoxCost: boxFlavorsCost + boxExtra
    });
    boxSelect.value = "";
    const repeatInput = document.getElementById('repeatBoxQty');
    if (repeatInput) repeatInput.value = "1";
    currentBoxLimit = null;
    renderFlavorMenu();
    renderCart();
    showToastNotification(`🛍️ 已成功打包 ${repeatQty} 組【${boxName}】放入明細！`);
    packBtn.disabled = false;
    packBtn.className = "w-full bg-[#5B7290] text-white font-extrabold tracking-widest h-12 rounded-xl hover:bg-[#3E4F66] transition-colors text-sm md:text-base uppercase shadow-xs cursor-pointer";
    packBtn.innerText = "確定組合，打包放入購物車";
    }, 600);
    }
    function showToastNotification(message) {
    const toast = document.createElement('div');
    toast.className = "fixed bottom-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-stone-900/95 text-white font-bold px-5 py-3.5 rounded-2xl shadow-xl z-50 text-xs md:text-sm tracking-wide flex items-center gap-2 border border-stone-800 transition-all duration-300 transform translate-y-10 opacity-0";
    toast.innerHTML = `<span>${message}</span>`;
    document.body.appendChild(toast);
    setTimeout(() => toast.classList.remove('translate-y-10', 'opacity-0'), 50);
    setTimeout(() => {
    toast.classList.add('translate-y-2', 'opacity-0');
    setTimeout(() => toast.remove(), 300);
    }, 3000);
    }
    window.removeFromCart = function(cartIdx) { cart.splice(cartIdx, 1); renderFlavorMenu(); renderCart(); }
    function renderCart() {
    const container = document.getElementById('cartListContainer');
    if(cart.length === 0) {
    container.innerHTML = `<p class="text-stone-400 text-center py-6 text-xs md:text-base">購物車目前空空的喔！</p>`;
    calculateTotal();
    return;
    }
    container.innerHTML = cart.map((box, i) => {
    const repeatQty = box.repeatQty || 1;
    const flavorDetailHtml = box.flavors.map(f => {
    const displayQty = f.quantity * repeatQty;
    return repeatQty > 1 ? `${f.name} x ${displayQty}個（${f.quantity}個 × ${repeatQty}組）` : `${f.name} x ${f.quantity}個`;
    }).join('、');
    const repeatLabel = repeatQty > 1 ? ` × ${repeatQty}組` : "";
    const priceHint = repeatQty > 1 && box.singleBoxCost ? `<div class="text-[11px] text-stone-400 font-bold mt-0.5">$${box.singleBoxCost} / 組</div>` : "";
    return `
    <div class="border border-stone-200 rounded-xl p-3 md:p-4 flex items-center justify-between gap-3 bg-stone-50/50">
    <div class="flex-1 min-w-0 space-y-0.5">
    <div class="font-extrabold text-sm md:text-base text-stone-900 tracking-wide">組合 ${i+1}：${box.boxName}${repeatLabel}</div>
    <div class="text-xs md:text-sm text-[#5B7290] font-bold leading-relaxed break-words">內含：${flavorDetailHtml}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="flex items-center gap-4 shrink-0">
    <div class="text-right"><span class="font-black text-sm md:text-base text-stone-950">$${box.boxTotalCost}</span>${priceHint}</div>
    <button type="button" onclick="removeFromCart(${i})" class="bg-stone-100 text-stone-400 p-1.5 rounded-lg w-7 h-7 md:w-8 md:h-8 flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-xs md:text-sm cursor-pointer">✕</button>
    </div>
    </div>`;
    }).join('');
    calculateTotal();
    }
    function calculateTotal() {
    let subtotal = 0;
    cart.forEach(box => subtotal += box.boxTotalCost);
    document.getElementById('subtotalDisplay').innerText = `$${subtotal}`;
    const shipMethod = document.getElementById('shipMethod').value;
    let finalTotal = subtotal;
    if(shipMethod === 'delivery') finalTotal += shippingFee;
    if (appliedCoupon) {
    const minSpendRequirement = Number(appliedCoupon.min_spend) || 0;
    if (subtotal < minSpendRequirement) {
    appliedCoupon = null;
    const msgElement = document.getElementById('couponMessage');
    msgElement.innerText = `✕ 金額未達門檻 ${minSpendRequirement} 元，已取消折抵。`;
    msgElement.className = "text-xs md:text-sm font-bold mt-1.5 text-orange-500";
    }
    }
    let discountAmount = 0;
    const couponDisplay = document.getElementById('couponDiscountDisplay');
    if (appliedCoupon && subtotal > 0) {
    if (appliedCoupon.type === 'minus') discountAmount = Number(appliedCoupon.value) || 0;
    else if (appliedCoupon.type === 'discount') discountAmount = Math.round(subtotal * (1 - Number(appliedCoupon.value)));
    if (discountAmount > finalTotal) discountAmount = finalTotal;
    finalTotal -= discountAmount;
    couponDisplay.querySelector('span').innerText = `-$${discountAmount}`;
    couponDisplay.classList.remove('hidden');
    } else { couponDisplay.classList.add('hidden'); }
    document.getElementById('totalDisplay').innerText = `$${finalTotal}`;
    return finalTotal;
    }
    window.applyCouponCode = function(isUserClick = false) {
    const inputVal = document.getElementById('couponInput').value.trim().toUpperCase();
    const msgElement = document.getElementById('couponMessage');
    if (inputVal === "") { appliedCoupon = null; msgElement.classList.add('hidden'); calculateTotal(); return; }
    let subtotal = 0; cart.forEach(box => subtotal += box.boxTotalCost);
    const match = localCoupons.find(c => c.code === inputVal);
    msgElement.classList.remove('hidden');
    if (match) {
    const minSpendRequirement = Number(match.min_spend) || 0;
    if (subtotal < minSpendRequirement) {
    appliedCoupon = null;
    msgElement.innerText = `✕ 最低消費需滿 ${minSpendRequirement} 元。`;
    msgElement.className = "text-xs md:text-sm font-bold mt-1.5 text-orange-500";
    } else {
    appliedCoupon = match;
    msgElement.innerText = `✓ 成功套用！(${match.type === 'minus' ? '現折 ' + match.value + ' 元' : '享 ' + (match.value * 10) + ' 折'})`;
    msgElement.className = "text-xs md:text-sm font-bold mt-1.5 text-emerald-600";
    }
    } else { appliedCoupon = null; msgElement.innerText = "✕ 折扣碼無效或已過期。"; msgElement.className = "text-xs md:text-sm font-bold mt-1.5 text-red-500"; }
    calculateTotal();
    }
    window.handleOrderSubmit = function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    if(cart.length === 0) { alert("購物車目前空空的喔！"); return; }
    const custName = document.getElementById('custName').value.trim();
    const custPhone = document.getElementById('custPhone').value.trim();
    if (!/^09\d{8}$/.test(custPhone)) {
    alert("請輸入正確的手機號碼（10碼，例如：0912345678）");
    document.getElementById('custPhone').focus();
    return;
    }
    const custEmail = document.getElementById('custEmail').value.trim();
    const shipMethodVal = document.getElementById('shipMethod').value;
    const rawShipDate = document.getElementById('shipDate').value;
    if (!custEmail) { alert("請輸入 Email，方便接收訂單通知。"); return; }
    if (!rawShipDate) { alert("請選擇預購取貨日期！"); return; }
    const shipDateWithWeekday = rawShipDate + getWeekdayStr(rawShipDate);
    const custAddress = document.getElementById('custAddress').value.trim();
    const finalTotal = calculateTotal();
    const orderId = "TEMP-" + new Date().getTime();
    const methodText = shipMethodVal === 'delivery' ? `7-11 店到店 (${custAddress})` : `門市自取付款 (高雄市前鎮區景德路72巷12號)`;
    document.getElementById('overlayDateLabel').innerText = shipMethodVal === 'delivery' ? "希望到貨日期：" : "門市自取日期：";
    document.getElementById('overlayMainTitle').innerText = "請再次確認取貨資訊";
    document.getElementById('overlaySubTitle').innerText = "倒數結束前可隨時確認或調整";
    document.getElementById('overlayBottomPrompt').innerText = "訂單準備送出中";
    document.getElementById('countdownTimer').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('loadingAnimationBlock').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('overlayActionButtons').style.display = 'flex';
    document.getElementById('overlayMethod').innerText = methodText;
    document.getElementById('overlayDate').innerText = shipDateWithWeekday;
    document.getElementById('overlayTotal').innerText = `$${finalTotal} 元`;
    pendingOrderSnapshot = { orderId, custName, custPhone, custEmail, shipDate: shipDateWithWeekday, shipMethodVal, custAddress, finalTotal };
    countdownSeconds = 20;
    document.getElementById('countdownTimer').innerText = countdownSeconds;
    document.getElementById('countdownOverlay').classList.remove('hidden');
    submissionInterval = setInterval(() => {
    countdownSeconds--;
    if (countdownSeconds > 0) document.getElementById('countdownTimer').innerText = countdownSeconds;
    else clearInterval(submissionInterval);
    }, 1000);
    submissionTimeout = setTimeout(async () => {
    clearInterval(submissionInterval);
    switchToLoadingState();
    await executeBackendPost(orderId, custName, custPhone, custEmail, shipDateWithWeekday, shipMethodVal, custAddress, finalTotal);
    }, 20000);
    }
    window.switchToLoadingState = function() {
    document.getElementById('overlayMainTitle').innerText = "預購單成立中";
    document.getElementById('overlaySubTitle').innerText = "正在送出您的訂單";
    document.getElementById('overlayBottomPrompt').innerText = "請勿關閉視窗或刷新網頁。";
    document.getElementById('countdownTimer').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('overlayActionButtons').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('loadingAnimationBlock').style.display = 'block';
    }
    View remainder of file in raw view
